refresh_failing.title: Ocado data is not refreshing
refresh_failing.description:
Home Assistant has been unable to refresh your Ocado data for {failures} consecutive attempts. The most recent error was: {error}.

Your last known delivery details are still shown. This usually clears itself once your mail server is reachable again. If it persists, Ocado may have changed their email format — please report it on the integration's issue tracker.
